parallel._comment_num_samplers: Number of parallel worker processes to run simultaneously. Used by run_evolution_cycle() and parallel_process_helper.run_sampler_worker(). Each worker gets a database shard and samples in parallel.
parallel._comment_num_islands: Total number of islands across all workers for evolutionary diversity. Used by programs_database.ProgramsDatabase.__init__() via ProgramsDatabaseConfig. Islands are independent sub-populations that evolve separately.
parallel._comment_enable_worker_timeout: Whether to enable worker timeout mechanisms. If false, workers can run indefinitely (useful for debugging). If true, workers are subject to timeout constraints below.
parallel._comment_worker_timeout_after_first_comp: Timeout in seconds for remaining workers after first worker completes (default 1 hour). Used by run_evolution_cycle() to detect stuck/hung workers. If a worker doesn't complete within this time after the first completion, it will be terminated and its input shard copied to output as fallback. Set to null to disable.
parallel._comment_absolute_worker_timeout: Absolute timeout in seconds from when workers start (default 2 hours). Safety net to prevent infinite waiting if all workers fail early. Used by run_evolution_cycle() monitoring loop. Set to null to disable.

evaluation._comment_num_evaluators: Number of evaluator instances per worker/process. Used by parallel_process_helper.create_worker_evaluators(). Creates EvaluatorWrapper instances that wrap EvaluatorET.
evaluation._comment_num_stories: Number of stories to generate per evaluation. Used by Evaluator.evaluator.EvaluatorET.__init__() and EvaluatorMock.EvaluatorWrapper.__init__(). Determines batch size for story generation and evaluation.
evaluation._comment_base_seed: Base random seed for reproducible story generation. Used by Collaterals.PrioStoryGeneratorNoRa1_1 via EvaluatorWrapper. Seeds are derived from this for different entities/stories.
evaluation._comment_min_entities: Minimum number of entities for story generation. Used by Collaterals.PrioStoryGeneratorNoRa1_1 via EvaluatorWrapper. Controls complexity of generated stories.
evaluation._comment_max_entities: Maximum number of entities for story generation. Used by Collaterals.PrioStoryGeneratorNoRa1_1 via EvaluatorWrapper. Controls complexity of generated stories.
evaluation._comment_num_cands: Number of candidate facts to assess before choosing one. Used by Collaterals.PrioStoryGeneratorNoRa1_1 via EvaluatorWrapper. Higher num_cands means more candidates will be assessed before one is chosen. Passed to evolved priority function for fact selection.
evaluation._comment_parallel_stories: Maximum number of stories to generate in parallel within each evaluator call (uses ProcessPoolExecutor). Stories beyond this count are generated in subsequent batches. Set to 1 to disable parallel story generation. With num_samplers=10 workers, keep this moderate (e.g. 6) to avoid over-subscribing CPUs.

sampling._comment_num_tries_per_sampler: Number of LLM calls each worker makes per cycle. Each call generates new code that is evaluated and inserted into one of the worker's islands. Used by run_evolution_cycle().
sampling._comment_num_reset: Number of reset/culling cycles (evolve → reset → evolve → reset...). Used by main() loop - controls outer evolutionary loop. Each cycle: evolve with LLM, then cull weak islands, keep strong ones.

llm._comment_use_local_llm: Whether to use local LLM or no LLM at all for code generation (Local False and served False = mock/random). Used by Sampler.sampler.Sampler.__init__() and parallel_process_helper.create_worker_sampler(). If both are False, generates random/mock code instead of calling LLM..only for testing.
llm._comment_use_served_llm: Whether to  served LLM or no LLM at all for code generation (Local False and served False = mock/random). Used by Sampler.sampler.Sampler.__init__() and parallel_process_helper.create_worker_sampler(). If both are False, generates random/mock code instead of calling LLM..only for testing.
llm._comment_llm_model: Model identifier for LLM configuration. Used by Sampler.sampler.Sampler._setup_llm() via llm_config parameter. Maps to model path in LlmModels directory.
llm._comment_max_llm_retries: Maximum retry attempts for LLM API calls on failure. Used by Sampler.sampler.Sampler.__init__() and parallel_process_helper.create_worker_sampler(). Handles transient LLM errors with exponential backoff.
llm._comment_base_url: Base URL for served LLM API endpoint (required when use_served_llm is true). Used by Sampler.samplerVLLMClient.LLM.__init__() and passed to LLMClient.__init__(). Points to vLLM server endpoint.

logging._comment_log_level: Logging verbosity level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL. Used by parallel_process_helper.setup_worker_logger() and main() for logger configuration. DEBUG shows detailed execution info, INFO shows key milestones only.
logging._comment_log_prompt_frequency: Log the formatted LLM prompt on the 1st call and then every N-th call. Controls verbosity of prompt debug logging in samplerVLLMClient.LLM._draw_sample().
logging._comment_log_eval_sample_frequency: Log the registered program sample on the 1st call and then every N-th call. Controls verbosity of sample debug logging in EvaluatorMock.EvaluatorWrapper.analyse().

database._comment_save_db_path: Path to save/load the programs database checkpoint (relative to project root or absolute). Used by programs_database.save_programs_database() and load_programs_database(). Enables resuming experiments from saved state.
database._comment_load_from_checkpoint: Whether to load existing database or create new one. Used by main() - controls initialization logic. If True and file exists: loads checkpoint; else: creates new database.
database._comment_referencedb: Path to reference database pickle file for seeding (null to skip, relative to project root or absolute). Used by database_initialization.initialize_database(). If provided, top programs from reference DB are extracted and registered to new database islands alongside the initial program.

template._comment_skeleton_path: Path to skeleton file containing program structure/template (relative to project root or absolute). Used by code_manipulation.text_to_program() to create template Program object. Template defines the structure that evolved priority functions fit into.
template._comment_function_to_evolve: Name of the function that the LLM will evolve. Used by programs_database.ProgramsDatabase.__init__() and database_sharding.shard_database(). Identifies which function in the template to replace with evolved versions.
template.priority_fn_str_ini:
def priority(cand_fact: str, definite_rules_program: str, entailed_facts: str, facts_program: str) -> float:
    '''
    Priority function for selecting among candidate facts.
    '''
    return 0.0
template._comment_priority_fn_str_ini: Initial version of the priority function to evolve. This simple baseline always returns 0.0, treating all facts equally. Used by EvaluatorMock.EvaluatorWrapper.analyse() for initial program registration. This is version 0 registered to all islands; LLM evolves improved versions.

multi_round._comment_num_rounds: Number of outer rounds. Each round runs num_reset evolution cycles, then retrains the ET model from the best priority function. Set to 1 to disable multi-round logic (legacy single-round mode).
multi_round._comment_base_run_dir: Root directory for run outputs. A datetime-stamped sub-directory (the run_dir) is created inside, and each round gets its own sub-directory within the run_dir. Contains DB checkpoints, sampler logs, training CSVs, models, and lightning logs per round.
multi_round._comment_resume_run_dir: Set to the path of a previous run_dir (e.g. 'Funsearch/Logs/RoundRuns/20260330_045414') to resume an interrupted SLURM run. The launcher detects the last fully completed round N from records.pkl, cleans up the partial round N+1, and restarts from round N+1 reusing round N's ET model and database (no retraining or rescoring if db_checkpoint_init.pkl was already written). Set to null for a fresh run.
multi_round._comment_alt_training_sources_init: CSV paths used to train the initial EdgeTransformer (ET_0) before round 1 evolution. Only used once. Paths resolved relative to the project root.
multi_round._comment_alt_training_sources_everyrnd: CSV paths merged into every round's final_train.csv alongside base_train.csv and the previous round's final_train.csv. Empty list means no extra sources beyond the evolving data.
multi_round._comment_num_stories_train: Number of stories to generate when creating base_train.csv from the best priority function at the end of each round. These stories are used to train the next round's EdgeTransformer.
multi_round._comment_num_stories_eval: Number of stories to generate when creating eval.csv from the best priority function at the end of each round. Uses a different seed than base_train.csv to ensure independent evaluation.
multi_round._comment_eval_seed_offset: Added to evaluation.base_seed to obtain the seed for eval.csv generation, ensuring it differs from base_train.csv generation seed.
multi_round._comment_et_epochs: Number of training epochs for EdgeTransformer retraining between rounds.
multi_round._comment_et_batch_size: Batch size for EdgeTransformer retraining between rounds.
multi_round._comment_et_lr: Learning rate for EdgeTransformer retraining between rounds.
multi_round._comment_et_training_seed: Random seed for EdgeTransformer retraining (controls data splits and initialisation).
multi_round._comment_et_dataset_type: Dataset type passed to the EdgeTransformer training routine.
multi_round._comment_et_max_final_training_size: If set, the final merged training CSV is randomly subsampled to at most this many rows before training. Null means no limit.
multi_round._comment_et_val_check_interval: Run validation every N epochs during ET training. Default 10 means val runs at epoch 10, 20, 30, ... and at epoch 0 (baseline before any training).
multi_round._comment_eval_device: Device for EdgeTransformer evaluation between rounds ('cuda' or 'cpu').
multi_round._comment_eval_max_samples: If set, randomly sample at most this many rows from each test CSV during between-round evaluation. Null means use all rows.
multi_round._comment_unique_labels_path: Path to unique_labels.pkl. Null defaults to Funsearch/Evaluator/unique_labels.pkl.
multi_round._comment_rules_path: Path to rules file for story generation. Null defaults to Funsearch/Collaterals/NoRa1.1.txt.
multi_round._comment_num_cands_training: Number of candidate facts for story generation during post-round CSV creation. May differ from evaluation.num_cands used during FunSearch cycles.
